channel.title: MBallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MBallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: GOP gubernatorial candidate Chad Bianco on allowing ICE to do its job
item.description: Sheriff Chad Bianco was elected in 2018 and 2022 as the Republican Riverside County Sheriff. He's now running for governor of California and is focuse...

item.title: Sorry, Bad Bunny — the USA Is Indeed ‘America’
item.description: Sad to say, he’s late to the game. Americans began calling themselves Americans in the 1700s.

item.title: China’s Monstrous Sentencing of Jimmy Lai
item.description: Foreign nations should think twice about flirting with Beijing as a reliable partner.

item.title: White House says Maxwell pardon request 'not a priority'
item.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt said Tuesday that the White House hasn't considered a potential pardon for Ghislaine Maxwell, a convicted...

item.title: Canada’s Mark Carney Can’t Even Challenge American Hegemony Without American Help
item.description: Canada's brave new challenge to American military power requires American weapons and technical support.

item.title: Top Dem Uses Fabricated AI Photo Of ICE After Getting Caught Fabricating J6 Records
item.description: Democrat Rep. Bennie Thompson used an AI-generated image of Alex Pretti’s death in which a federal immigration agent is missing his head during a Home...

item.title: 'Going to hell': ICE in hot seat over Minnesota deaths
item.description: The government's top immigration enforcers came to Capitol Hill on Tuesday to deliver their first defense after the slaying of two American citizens i...

item.title: Maine Sen. Susan Collins balances uneasy affiliation with Trump in quest for sixth term
item.description: The reelection prospects of Sen. Susan Collins of Maine could hinge on how well she walks a political tightrope of distancing herself from President T...

item.title: Why Canada Engaged China Ahead of the USMCA Review
item.description: The country’s trade deal with Beijing is risk-management under pressure, not a pivot away from the United States.

item.title: The Coming Political-Process Armageddon
item.description: Democrats could find themselves briefly in power with their prospects slipping away. Beware what they may do.

item.title: RINO Senators Could Sink The SAVE Act
item.description: Sources say some Senate Republicans don't want to see the popular election-integrity measure come up for a vote.

item.title: Arizona House Advances Constitutional Amendment To End Delayed Election Results
item.description: The Arizona House of Representatives advanced a constitutional amendment on Monday that seeks to end the state’s post-Election Day chaos and delayed e...

item.title: A Requiem for Communist Cuba’s Apologists
item.description: Conditions on the island are deteriorating rapidly.

item.title: House Republicans subpoena health insurers for Obamacare fraud investigation
item.description: House Judiciary Committee Republicans issued subpoenas to eight Affordable Care Act health insurers -- a recent development in a wider investigation o...

item.title: 9th Circuit Rules DHS Can Ax Temporary Protected Status For 60K Foreign Nationals
item.description: 'We conclude that the government is likely to succeed on the merits of its appeal either by showing that the district court lacked jurisdiction or by ...
